name: Bars Sharp pow 3
description: Horizontal and vertical bar patterns with pow-3 sharpening. Tests organization with richer spatial structure. Run after validating halves work.

config.description: BARS_H (3 horizontal bars) and BARS_V (3 vertical bars) with pow-3 sharpening. More complex spatial patterns than halves — tests whether the tissue can develop different receptive fields for each orientation.
